decks.notes: The deck focuses on maintaining control of the game through counterspells, removal, and hand disruption. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan by countering their spells, removing their threats, and forcing them to discard important cards with cards like Thoughtseize and Sink into Stupor. The deck also utilizes powerful creatures like Quantum Riddler and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to control the board and close out the game. Overall, the key concept of this Dimir Control deck is to control the game and outvalue the opponent through disruption and powerful threats.

The deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures like Griselbrand using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate while controlling the board with cards like Thoughtseize and Prismatic Ending. Atraxa, Grand Unifier helps to accelerate the game plan and provide additional value. The deck aims to win the game through a powerful combo play using instant-speed reanimation and efficient removal spells, disrupting the opponent's strategy while setting up its own win condition.

The deck is focused on quickly assembling a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with a combination of artifacts and efficient creatures. By utilizing cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke for disruption, as well as Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager for card advantage and synergy, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and maintain control of the battlefield. Additionally, cards like Tormod's Crypt and Pithing Needle provide answers to graveyard and activated abilities, ensuring that the deck can adapt to different strategies and threats.

The main concept of this deck is to create a powerful combo utilizing the interaction between Broodscale creatures and Blade of the Bloodchief. The deck aims to ramp up mana quickly with cards like Boseiju, Who Endures and Eldrazi Temple to bring out high-cost creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End. The inclusion of cards like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command help control the board while Glaring Fleshraker and Devourer of Destiny put pressure on the opponent. Urza's Saga is also utilized to search for key pieces of the combo.

This Boros Aggro deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, backed up by burn spells and pump effects. The deck's mana base is designed to provide consistent access to its powerful threats, while cards like Goblin Bombardment and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah offer additional ways to deal damage and control the board. The deck's combination of speed and firepower makes it a formidable force in the Modern format, capable of ending games quickly and decisively.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combination of cards centered around the creatures Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker, along with Blade of the Bloodchief to pump them up. Utilizing Eldrazi Temple and ramp spells like Kozilek's Command, the deck aims to quickly generate mana and summon Emrakul, the Promised End or other high-impact Eldrazi creatures. Additional support from Ugin's Labyrinth and Malevolent Rumble helps control the board, while Urza's Saga and Boseiju, Who Endures provide additional utility and protection. Sowing Mycospawn and other cards provide further versatility and options for the pilot.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with artifact creatures and using various spells and abilities to control the board and deal damage to the opponent. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga help to quickly get artifacts onto the battlefield, while cards like Metallic Rebuke provide disruption for the opponent's game plan. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student can generate card advantage and help dig for key pieces, while Unholy Heat and Quantum Riddler offer removal and additional damage options. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and control.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy through hand disruption cards like Inquisition of Kozilek and Thoughtseize, while also using cards like Lantern of Insight and Codex Shredder to control the top of the opponent's library. Ensnaring Bridge and Blood Moon are used to keep the opponent from attacking effectively and disrupting their mana base. The deck also includes win conditions like Molten Collapse and The Underworld Cookbook to finish off the opponent once their game plan has been disrupted. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and win through attrition.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan and control the board using a combination of counter spells, hand disruption, removal, and card advantage. The deck aims to slow down the opponent's strategy, protect its own key cards, and ultimately out-value the opponent by efficiently dealing with threats and maintaining control of the game. It utilizes a variety of powerful control tools such as Counterspell, Thoughtseize, and Fatal Push, while also incorporating card draw engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Cling to Dust to maintain resources and stay ahead in the game.

The deck focuses on creating a fast and aggressive strategy using artifacts and creatures to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Urza's Saga, Mox Opal, and Pinnacle Emissary, the deck aims to establish an early board presence and apply pressure. Cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide removal and disruption, while Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mishra's Bauble offer card advantage and recursion. The deck also includes support cards like Tormod's Crypt and Claws of Gix to further disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly reanimate creatures with powerful abilities, such as Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand, using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Quantum Riddler. This deck aims to set up explosive combos by recurring creatures with Ephemerate and utilizing cards like Solitude for removal. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Force of Negation and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's game plan. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the various color requirements of the deck while maintaining consistency in executing its reanimation strategy.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo without the need for traditional land cards. By utilizing cards like Goblin Charbelcher, Lotus Bloom, and Whir of Invention, the player can quickly cycle through their deck and disrupt the opponent's strategy. With counterspells like Disrupting Shoal and Spell Snare, as well as removal spells like Suppression Ray and Sink into Stupor, the deck aims to control the game while building towards its combo finish. Tameshi, Reality Architect, Thundertrap Trainer, and Fallaji Archaeologist provide additional synergy and value to the deck's strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with key creatures like Atraxa and Griselbrand, then use cards like Faithful Mending and Goryo's Vengeance to bring them back onto the battlefield for a surprise attack. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Force of Negation and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's actions, while utilizing cards like Quantum Riddler and Ephemerate to generate value and protect its combo pieces. With a focus on instant reanimation, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures and take control of the game in a fast and unexpected manner.

The deck focuses on quickly milling the opponent's library using cards like Hedron Crab, Ruin Crab, and Archive Trap. By disrupting the opponent's game plan through milling, and controlling their resources with cards like Field of Ruin and Path to Exile, the deck aims to win the game through the milling win condition. It also includes cards like Visions of Beyond and Fractured Sanity to draw cards and enable the milling strategy. The deck combines control elements with a mill win condition to create a unique and powerful archetype in Modern 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of this deck is to use the Allosaurus Rider along with Neoform and Eldritch Evolution to quickly search and put out powerful creatures such as Griselbrand, Ghalta, and Xenagos. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer to protect its combo pieces and disrupt opponent's strategies. The use of cards like Consign to Memory, Nourishing Shoal, and Endurance also provide ways to gain life or counter threats. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces efficiently and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures while also utilizing blink effects to generate additional value and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By combining powerful creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer with cards like Ephemerate and Consign to Memory, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and control the board with efficient removal spells like Solitude and Quantum Riddler. Additionally, the deck includes a variety of lands to ensure smooth mana distribution and consistency in casting its spells.
